VaccineValidateR 1.0.0

Summarize Visit-Level Immunization Evaluations

Source: R/summarize_visits.R
summarize_visits.Rd

Summarize output from evaluate_visits(), producing counts and percentages of visits where vaccines were due, given, or missed. Grouping can be flexibly specified by time period and user-defined columns.

Usage

summarize_visits(
  visit_output,
  antigens_of_interest = NULL,
  time_slice = c("NONE", "YEAR", "MONTH", "BIMONTH", "QUARTER", "FOURMONTH", "VIRAL"),
  group_cols = NULL,
  first_per_group = TRUE,
  percent_var = "PCT_GIVEN_IF_DUE",
  verbose = TRUE,
  output_format = c("long", "wide")
)

Arguments

visit_output

A data.table returned by evaluate_visits(). Must contain standardized columns defined in VISIT_RETURN_COLUMNS, including ANTIGEN, VISIT_DATE, DUE, GIVEN, and MISSED. Must also have attribute "processed" set.

antigens_of_interest

Character vector of antigen names to include. Default is NULL, in which case all antigens in the data are used.

time_slice

Character; defines how to group visits by time period. Must be one of:

  • "NONE" — no time-based grouping (all visits grouped together).

  • "YEAR" — calendar year of VISIT_DATE.

  • "MONTH" — calendar month of VISIT_DATE, labeled as YYYY-MM.

  • "BIMONTH" — two-month intervals (Jan–Feb, Mar–Apr, etc.), labeled as YYYY-MM (ending month).

  • "QUARTER" — three-month quarters (Q1–Q4), labeled as YYYY-Qn.

  • "FOURMONTH" — four-month periods (Jan–Apr, May–Aug, Sep–Dec), labeled as YYYY-Pn.

  • "VIRAL" — viral season grouping (August–July), where visits from September–December are assigned to the current year and visits from January–July are assigned to the previous year (e.g., September 2024–April 2025 → 2024 season).

Default is "NONE".

group_cols

Optional character vector of additional grouping column names. These columns must exist in visit_output.

first_per_group

Logical; if TRUE, restricts to the first visit per STUDY_ID within each grouping set. Default TRUE.

percent_var

Character; which percentage column to pivot on in wide format. Default is "PCT_GIVEN_IF_DUE". Other valid options are "PCT_MISSED_IF_DUE", "PCT_WITHIN_15_DAYS_IF_MISSED", "PCT_WITHIN_30_DAYS_IF_MISSED", and "PCT_WITHIN_90_DAYS_IF_MISSED".

verbose

Logical; if TRUE, prints progress messages. Default TRUE.

output_format

Either "long" (default; stacked rows with antigen labels) or "wide" (one row per group, antigens as columns).

Value

A data.table summarizing the requested antigens:

  • In "long" format: one row per group with counts, percents, and labels.

  • In "wide" format: one row per grouping set, columns for each antigen.

Examples

# Summarize all antigens by year and antigen
summarize_visits(visit_output)
#> No antigens_of_interest provided. Using all existing antigens: HPV, MCV, TETANUS, INFLUENZA
#> Starting visit-level summarization...
#> Restricting to first event per STUDY_ID within grouping vars.
#> Completed summarization at 2025-10-24 10:06:52.836414
#> Key: <ANTIGEN>
#>      ANTIGEN  VISITS     DUE  GIVEN  MISSED DELAYED_PRIOR DELAYED_VISIT
#>       <char>   <int>   <int>  <int>   <int>         <int>         <int>
#> 1:       HPV  907373  907373 175814  731559         12884         45538
#> 2: INFLUENZA 1793644 1793644 542993 1250651        174037         97516
#> 3:       MCV  721729  721729 363571  358158         10734         35860
#> 4:   TETANUS 1316225 1316225 744436  571789        262724         75605
#>    DELAYED_NEXT NO_FUTHER_DOSES GIVEN_WITHIN_15_DAYS GIVEN_WITHIN_30_DAYS
#>           <int>           <int>                <int>                <int>
#> 1:        99999          508214                11293                19445
#> 2:       208895          932252                59802               109405
#> 3:        47800          503114                19280                33733
#> 4:        81319          746160                59255                90647
#>    GIVEN_WITHIN_90_DAYS PCT_GIVEN_IF_DUE PCT_MISSED_IF_DUE
#>                   <int>            <num>             <num>
#> 1:                39185        0.1937616         0.8062384
#> 2:               207112        0.3027318         0.6972682
#> 3:                69236        0.5037500         0.4962500
#> 4:               145261        0.5655842         0.4344158
#>    PCT_WITHIN_15_DAYS_IF_MISSED PCT_WITHIN_30_DAYS_IF_MISSED
#>                           <num>                        <num>
#> 1:                   0.01543690                   0.02658022
#> 2:                   0.04781670                   0.08747844
#> 3:                   0.05383099                   0.09418469
#> 4:                   0.10363088                   0.15853226
#>    PCT_WITHIN_90_DAYS_IF_MISSED
#>                           <num>
#> 1:                   0.05356369
#> 2:                   0.16560335
#> 3:                   0.19331133
#> 4:                   0.25404651

# Summarize by system, site, and viral season
summarize_visits(visit_output,
  time_slice = "VIRAL",
  group_cols = c("SYSTEM","SITE"),
  output_format = "wide",
  percent_var = "PCT_MISSED_IF_DUE")
#> No antigens_of_interest provided. Using all existing antigens: HPV, MCV, TETANUS, INFLUENZA
#> Starting visit-level summarization...
#> Error in summarize_visits(visit_output, time_slice = "VIRAL", group_cols = c("SYSTEM",     "SITE"), output_format = "wide", percent_var = "PCT_MISSED_IF_DUE"): Grouping columns not found in data: SITE
